info.title: Trackeroo API
info.description: Lightweight self-hosted task tracker: epics, tasks, swimlanes, dependencies, blockers, comments, and links. This spec is the canonical REST contract — regenerate docs/openapi.json via `python -m app.export_openapi` after any route/schema change.

schema.title: Response Reorder Swimlanes Api Swimlanes Reorder Post
Response List Epics Api Epics Get
Response List Tasks Api Tasks Get
Response List Comments Api Tasks  Task Id  Comments Get

TaskDetail.title: TaskDetail
TaskDetail.description: Full representation nesting comments, links, and dependencies.

TaskOut.title: TaskOut
TaskOut.description: Summary representation of a task (list views).
